titleStmt.title: SII 27.356: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 356. (A.R. No. 328 of 1931-32.) SURĀLA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 3) set up in the inner prākāra of the Mahāliṅgēśvara temple.
This damaged record is dated Śaka 1339, Durmukha, Śrāvaṇa. Other details are not given. It corresponds to 1416-17 A.D., the Śaka year being current.

It registers a gift of land made by Mādāḍi Toḷaha for feeding Brāhmaṇas daily in the temple of Mahādēva at Surāla. The record was caused to be engraved by Bemmaṇa-kōri Toḷaha. It mentions Neṇagunda30.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipataEnamaḥ . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mū
lastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1330 neya durmukha saṁvacharada śrāvaṇa mā
sadalu śrīmatu sakalaguṇa saṁpaṁnarapa beṁmaṇa kōriyarāda toḷahara kāladali hosabukōriyara kumāravṛttiyalu
Avara taṁmaṁdiru Aḷiyaṁdiru sahitavāgi Eradūranū nākumaneya baṁdugaḷanū neṇaguṁda mūvattanū koḍikoṁḍu
beṁmaṇakōri toḷaharu barasida śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare sūrāla mahādēvara dēvālyadali dinaṁprati brāhmaṇa bhōjana
ḍavaṁtāgi madāḍi toḷaharu māḍidaṁthā dharmada bāḷiṁda naḍava Akkiya vivara bāḷakaṭṭina hosagaddeya bageyali nāgaṁḍugada muḷi
bāḷanu nimma bellagaddeya bageyiṁda mū ¢ pudugrāmada puḷiUḷitana bageya bāḷiṁda mū ¢ jaya
reya mauguḷiya gadde Eraḍuvare mūḍe bittuva bāḷiṁda Akkimūḍe ṁnyaṁṇa kalyāṇana dharmmada
bāḷiṁda naḍava Akki mū ṇa kalyāṇana bāḷiṁda naḍava Akkimūḍe gōyiṁda kalyāṇana bāḷiṁda naḍava Akki mū 3 toḷaha
ba liṁda paḍuvalu baḷu mūḍe bittuva baya liṁda naḍava Akki mū 1 ra paḍuva beṭṭina nāraṇauḷitana bayalagaddeyiṁda naḍava Akki
ḍupanabāḷiṁda naḍava Akki hā 30 Ā bageyiṁda maṁgalaṁta viṣṇubāḷiṁda naḍava Akki hā 15 Ā bageyiṁda ra kōṭīsvara mēlaṁ Aḷi
yaṁdira bāḷiṁda naḍava Akki hā 10 seṭṭiya dharṁmada kuṁbāra bayaloḷage Ayidu mūḍe bittuva Eraḍu hayala gaddeyiṁda The rest of the record is badly damaged.
Digital edition of SII 27.356 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
